Headline: 395 95th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 95th/Peoria
ShortDescription: Eastbound 95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 95th, Vincennes, 99th, Halsted and 95th due to, street blockage near 95th/Peoria.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 95th, Vincennes, 99th, Halsted and 95th due to, street blockage near 95th/Peoria.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Loop-bound Brown Line Delays
ShortDescription: Loop-bound Brown Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem at Armitage. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Loop-bound Brown Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem at Armitage.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
